# Workflow — underwrite

Build a complete, conditional investment-research thesis.

Run:

```bash
python3 -m finance_skills underwrite --ticker <TICKER> --format json
```

Permitted specialists are the fundamental analyst, forensic accountant, and
valuation skeptic. They receive the same immutable report and may not fetch or
calculate new numbers.

Analyze company profile, revenue quality and durability, margin structure, cash
conversion, capital intensity, stock-based compensation, dilution, balance
sheet, valuation basis, bull and bear cases, the core assumption, disconfirming
conditions, and unresolved questions.

Response:

1. Thesis
2. Business and growth quality
3. Economics and cash flow
4. Balance sheet and dilution
5. Valuation condition
6. Bull case
7. Bear case
8. Assumption doing the most work
9. What would break the thesis
10. Data limitations

Preserve specialist disagreement and reject unsupported specialist claims.
